# Runtime Scheduling SSOT

<!-- Generated by go run ./tools/runtimeschedulingdocs -write-doc. Do not edit by hand. -->

Executable SSOT: [`runtime-scheduling.riido.json`](runtime-scheduling.riido.json).

Evidence artifact: `runtime-scheduling-docs`.

C5 Runtime Scheduling owns which runtime can claim and execute a task, runtime capability eligibility, runtime lease pinning, and heartbeat meaning.

Reader documentation is generated from this manifest so scheduling boundaries are expressed as executable evidence instead of prose-only guidance.

## Executable Assertions

- runtime scheduling dispatches by task requirements and capability snapshots, not provider binary version strings
- runtime scheduling keeps provider FSM, provider session schema, and client read models outside C5
- reader docs for the C5 entrypoint and core invariants are generated from this manifest
